zh.Waye by Ashburton, Devon, England: 英國戴文瓦也 白 阿申波頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter of Horewood Pollard esq於大約1417年出生在英國戴文瓦也 白 阿申波頓時，他的父親John Waye Pollard29歲，母親Alyanora Copplestone23歲。他於大約1435年與Joan Baron在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他在英國英格蘭戴文聖 基路士 在 馮 伍德被列為lord of the manor of way。

zh-hans.Waye by Ashburton, Devon, England: 英国戴文瓦也 白 阿申波頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter of Horewood Pollard esq于大约1417年出生在英国戴文瓦也 白 阿申波頓时，他的父亲John Waye Pollard29岁，母亲Alyanora Copplestone23岁。他于大约1435年与Joan Baron在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他在英国英格兰戴文聖 基路士 在 馮 伍德被列为lord of the manor of way。

nameMeanings.name: Pollard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: perhaps a nickname from an unrecorded Middle English pollard, a derivative of the Middle English verb poll ‘to clip’ or the noun poll ‘the head’. It may have denoted someone with a close‐cropped head or a big head.
from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Pollard, a pet form of Paul (Old French Pol). The surname has been established in both England and Ireland since the 13th century.

variants.name: Paul
meanings: English, French, German, Dutch, Swedish, West Indian (mainly Haiti, also e.g. Saint Lucia), and African (mainly Nigeria and Tanzania): from the personal name Paul (from Latin Paulus ‘small’), which has always been popular in Christendom. It was the name adopted by the Pharisee Saul of Tarsus after his conversion to Christianity on the road to Damascus in about AD 34. He was a most energetic missionary to the Gentiles in the Roman Empire, and played a very significant role in establishing Christianity as a major world religion. The name was borne also by numerous other early Christian saints. It is also occasionally borne by Jews; the reasons for this are not clear. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages and their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Greek Pavlis , Slovenian Pavel and Pavlič (see Pavlic ), Polish Paweł (see Pawel ) and Pawlicki , Assyrian/Chaldean Polous and Polus . In France, this surname is most common in Brittany (see 2 below).
Breton (mainly Finistère): from a Frenchified form of the personal name Paol, Breton form of Paul .
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Phóil ‘son of Paul’. Compare McFall .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Horewood
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Harwood
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from any of several places called Harwood (Lancashire, Northumberland, North Yorkshire, Devon), Harewood (Herefordshire, Yorkshire), or Horwood (Devon). The placenames derive from Old English hār ‘gray’ or hara ‘hare’ + wudu ‘wood’. This name has also become established in Ireland.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter of Horewood Pollard esq was born about 1417, in Waye by Ashburton, Devon, England, his father, John Waye Pollard, was 29 and his mother, Alyanora Copplestone, was 23. He married Joan Baron about 1435, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. His occupation is listed as lord of the manor of way in Saint Giles in the Wood, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter of Horewood Pollard esq est né environ 1417, à Waye by Ashburton, Devon, Angleterre, son père, John Waye Pollard, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Alyanora Copplestone, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Joan Baron environ 1435, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Sa profession de son indiquée est lord of the manor of way à Saint Giles in the Wood, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter of Horewood Pollard esq um 1417 in Waye by Ashburton, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Waye Pollard 29 und seine Mutter Alyanora Copplestone 23. Er hat um 1435 in Devon, England Joan Baron geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. sein Beruf ist als lord of the manor of way in Saint Giles in the Wood, Devon, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter of Horewood Pollard esq è nato il circa 1417 nel Waye by Ashburton, Devon, England, il suo padre, John Waye Pollard, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Alyanora Copplestone, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Joan Baron circa 1435, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. La sua occupazione è indicata come lord of the manor of way nel Saint Giles in the Wood, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Waye by Ashburton, Devon, England: イギリスデボンワイ ビー アシュブルトン
ja.Devon, England, United Kingdom: イギリスイギリスデボン
ja.Devon, England: イギリスイギリスデボン
ja.lifeSummary: Walter of Horewood Pollard esqが約1417年にイギリスデボンワイ ビー アシュブルトンで生まれた時，父John Waye Pollardは29歳，母Alyanora Copplestoneは23歳であった。約1435年にイギリスデボンでJoan Baronと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。イギリスイギリスデボンサイント ギレス イン ス ウッドでの職業はlord of the manor of wayと記録されている。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter of Horewood Pollard esq(이)가 대략 1417년 영국 데폰 웨이 비 애쉬버턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Waye Pollard(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Alyanora Copplestone(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1435년 영국 데폰에서 Joan Baron(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세인트 자일스 인 테 우드에서 lord of the manor of way이었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter of Horewood Pollard esq nasceu aproximadamente 1417, em Waye by Ashburton, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Waye Pollard, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Alyanora Copplestone, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Baron aproximadamente 1435, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Sua profissão aparece como lord of the manor of way em Saint Giles in the Wood, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter of Horewood Pollard esq родился около 1417 г. в местности веи би ашбуртон, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени John Waye Pollard было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Alyanora Copplestone, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Baron около 1435 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь.  Он работал по профессии lord of the manor of way в местности сеинт джилесь ин т вуд, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter of Horewood Pollard esq nació aproximadamente 1417, en Waye by Ashburton, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, John Waye Pollard, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Alyanora Copplestone, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Joan Baron aproximadamente 1435, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Su ocupación registrada era lord of the manor of way en Saint Giles in the Wood, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
